heroHeadline: High Seas Treaty at 92 Parties; Right Whale Season Yields 22-23 Calves
heroSubtitle: The BBNJ High Seas Treaty climbs to 92 ratifications heading into CoP1 (January 2027), as PrepCom 3 advances implementation structures for the first international ocean MPAs. Earth Day 2026 celebrated crossing 10% ocean protection, while North Atlantic Right Whale Day marked 22-23 calves this season — a rare uptick for the critically endangered species.
footerNote: Data sourced from NOAA, UNEP, The Ocean Cleanup, IUCN, Australian Institute of Marine Science, High Seas Alliance, UN BBNJ Agreement, and major scientific institutions. Coordinates verified against NOAA and OpenStreetMap references.
